A person in a grey t-shirt and black shorts stands on dirt near green artificial turf, holding a yellow discus with a metal rim and adjusting their grip.

[108-118] A person in a grey shirt and black shorts holds a yellow discus with a metal rim. They gesture near the rim and center hub, eventually letting their right hand hang by their side while standing on dirt beside a strip of green artificial turf. [118-122] The scene cuts to a wide shot of the athlete inside a safety net on a concrete circle. Graphical overlays include distance markers '70 60 50 40 30 20 10', a red vertical line labeled '10 20', and a floating blue and yellow bar. The athlete prepares and initiates a spin, pivoting on the left foot and swinging the discus outward to generate momentum.

From 122s to 128s, a male athlete in a grey shirt and black shorts rotates inside a concrete circle enclosed by a black safety net. He pivots on his left foot, extending his arms wide to swing the discus. Digital overlays showing distance markers, a red vertical axis, a yellow trajectory path, and a discus icon track the movement against ground markers. At 126s, the athlete releases the discus, transitioning from a spin to a follow-through stance as a yellow graphical trajectory line extends outward, tracking the discus icon as it flies. From 128s to 136s, the athlete walks away from the throwing circle towards the right side of the cage near the red vertical marker. A yellow graphical arc traces the flight path past the 50-meter mark alongside a lower blue trajectory line. Digital overlays displaying these arcs and distance numbers remain fixed on the screen against a background of a green field, trees, and blue sky. The athlete continues walking near the net as the graphics persist.
